commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 2 Chronicles 27:7 Now the rest of the acts of Jotham, and all his wars, and his ways, lo, they are written in the book of the kings of Israel and Judah. Gerara, (St. Jerome, Trad. ) or Gebal, Psalm lxxxii. Septuagint, "the rock "or Petra, in Arabia, where Stephanus places the Gabalenes. Hebrew mehunim. Septuagint, "Mineans "(chap. ; Haydock) upon the Red Sea, (Stephanus) or Mediterranean, (Pliny, vi. 28,) or in Arabia Felix. (Strabo) (Menochius).
